title: Don't Want to Give AI Agents Your Logins? Here's How to Avoid It With 1Password for Claude
summary: 1Password for Claude is now available on Mac across its business, family, and individual plans. You'll need 1Password for Mac (version 8.12.28 or later), 1Password browser extension (version 8.12.28 or later), the Claude desktop app , and the Claude browser extension.
